title: Substring with At Least K Repeats and Swaps

statement.markdown: Given a string s and an integer k, return the length of the longest substring that can be formed by repeating a string of length k at least once and swapping at most once.
statement.inputFormat: The first line of the input contains an integer n, the length of the string s. The second line of the input contains the string s.
statement.outputFormat: The output should contain the length of the longest substring that satisfies the condition.

examples.explanation: One possible solution is "aaaaabaaaa" which can be formed by repeating "aaaab".

hints.text: First, try to find the longest substring of length k that can be repeated at least once.
Then, try to find the maximum number of swaps needed to form the substring.

functionSignature.java: public int solve(String s, int k);
functionSignature.python: def solve(self, s: str, k: int) -> int;
